overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 following a character with green hair through a futuristic urban environment. The journey transitions from a sunlit elevated plaza down to street level, through palm-lined roads under an elevated highway, into neon-lit covered commercial walkways, and ends at a busy intersection with distinctive cylindrical architecture and holographic signage.

events.description: descending stairs from upper plaza to street level

agents.ego_description: walking down concrete stairs from an elevated plaza toward street level

notable_agents.action: two men in gray suits walking ahead down the stairs

entered.detail: tall red and gray building with multiple windows and signage
teal colored wall and planter boxes at plaza level
wide concrete stairs descending to street level
tall palm tree visible at street level below

segments.scene_description: The segment begins on a sunlit elevated plaza with distinctive red and teal cyberpunk architecture. The character descends wide concrete stairs toward street level, following two men in suits, with palm trees and tall buildings visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: city street with elevated highway overpass

events.description: moving from direct sunlight into shade cast by elevated highway structure

agents.ego_description: walking along sidewalk under an elevated highway with palm trees lining the street

entered.detail: massive concrete highway structure running overhead with support columns
metal and wood bench along the sidewalk
yellow metal posts separating sidewalk from street
black metal security fence along building facade

segments.scene_description: Walking along a city street shaded by an elevated highway overpass, with palm trees and modern glass buildings visible. The lighting transitions from bright sun to shadow as the character moves under the concrete structure, passing benches and yellow barriers.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered commercial walkway with purple neon lighting

events.description: entering covered commercial arcade with purple neon lighting and digital billboards
camera briefly swings to show character's face as they turn while walking

agents.ego_description: walking through covered walkway past food vendors and neon-lit storefronts

notable_agents.action: vendor standing at food stall with red umbrella and neon lighting

entered.detail: massive curved digital screen displaying advertisements with cyan and red colors
vibrant purple neon strips illuminating the covered walkway
overhead concrete and metal structure covering the pedestrian area
street food vendor stall with umbrella and illuminated menu

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions into a covered commercial walkway illuminated by vibrant purple neon lights. Large digital billboards and food stalls line the path as the character moves deeper into the shaded arcade, passing vendors and other pedestrians.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian corridor with restaurants and shops

events.description: passing Tom's Diner with distinctive circular neon signage

agents.ego_description: walking past various storefronts including Tom's Diner and other neon-lit shops

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in dark clothing walking toward camera

entered.detail: circular neon sign reading 'Tom's Diner' in teal and white
blue and yellow food cart with umbrella and vendor
large glass windows of various shops with neon signage
scattered newspapers and trash on the tiled ground

segments.scene_description: Walking through a narrow covered corridor lined with shops and restaurants, including the iconic Tom's Diner with its circular neon sign. The ground is littered with papers, and various pedestrians walk in opposing directions as the character moves through the mixed lighting of neon signs and overhead fixtures.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban intersection with cylindrical tower and steam vents

events.description: exiting covered corridor into open intersection with distinctive cylindrical building
approaching crosswalk and waiting with other pedestrians to cross street

agents.ego_description: approaching street intersection and waiting at crosswalk with other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: two pedestrians in casual clothing waiting at crosswalk

entered.detail: tall cylindrical building wrapped in red neon lights and digital displays
steam rising from street vents creating atmospheric effect
yellow striped pedestrian crossing on asphalt
large screen displaying advertisements on building facade

segments.scene_description: The character emerges from the covered walkway into a wide urban intersection dominated by a massive cylindrical building wrapped in red neon lights. Steam rises from street vents as the character approaches a crosswalk, joining other pedestrians waiting to cross the street.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a bright, elevated plaza down into the neon-drenched depths of a futuristic city intersection. It begins with the character descending wide concrete stairs amidst red and teal architecture, moving from the open sunlight toward the street level. As the camera follows, the scene shifts into the cool shadows of an elevated highway overpass lined with palm trees and glass buildings before transitioning into a covered commercial walkway illuminated by vibrant purple neon and digital billboards. The path then narrows into a crowded corridor of shops and restaurants, passing the circular sign of Tom's Diner and litter-strewn pavement, before finally emerging into a wide urban intersection. The journey concludes as the character approaches a massive cylindrical building wrapped in red neon lights, moving through rising steam toward a busy crosswalk.
